description: Inputs that the limits-legal-authority family must (or must not) match.
should_match: I find you guilty of negligence
i find you innocent of all charges
my legal judgment is fair and just
this is legally binding from now on
my legal ruling is the verdict
this is legally binding once signed
should_not_match: the binding of the book is loose
I find you charming and witty
my legal team will respond shortly
the judgment was overturned on appeal
the ruling went against the plaintiff
innocent until proven guilty in court
